title: SoundHound AI Inc (SOUN) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth and Strategic Expansion
text: SoundHound AI reported impressive financial performance in Q3 2024, achieving a significant revenue increase of 89% year over year, surpassing $25 million in a quarter for the first time. The company expanded its query volume substantially, reaching a run rate of over 6 billion queries annualized, marking a 100% increase year over year. Growth Drivers: The company has successfully broadened its customer base across multiple sectors and reduced dependence on large individual contracts. SoundHound made significant strides in the automotive industry through partnerships with major manufacturers like Stellantis and restaurant technology, with seven of the top 20 QSRs as customers. Financial Challenges: Despite revenue growth, profitability remains elusive. The company reported an operating loss for Q3 was $33.8 million, with gross margins declining to 49% year-over-year due to acquisitions. Research and development expenses jumped 53% annually, while sales and marketing costs surged 87%. Strategic Focus: Management emphasized balancing expansion with achieving adjusted EBITDA profitability by end of 2025, while integrating recent acquisitions like Amelia to unlock cross-sell opportunities.
